nodes.label: Retry With Error Categorization Tests
nodes.rationale: Covers: STANDARD_RETRY fixed 1s/2s/4s delays, RetryConfig fixed vs exponential backoff and jitter range, retry_sync/retry_async retrying retryable errors but failing fast on fatal errors (401/403/session expired), and retry_operation platform-context error categorization (X rate limits retry, IG session expiry fatal).
